aiSummaryCN:
【技术观点】
比特币短期走势呈现震荡整理。
【关键位置】
支撑位：70,000 美元，阻力位：75,000 美元。
【走势推演】
短期内或将维持在 70,000 美元至 75,000 美元区间内波动。
【一句提醒】
投资者需注意价格波动风险，谨慎操作。
aiSummaryEN:
[Today's View]
Bitcoin's short-term trend is consolidating.
[Key Drivers]
Support level: $70,000, Resistance level: $75,000.
[Outlook]
It is expected to fluctuate within the range of $70,000 to $75,000 in the short term.
[Reminder]
Investors should be aware of price volatility risks and operate with caution.
